response: This code implements the Knuth-Morris-Pratt (KMP) string-searching algorithm to find the first occurrence of a `pattern` substring within a `text` string, returning the starting index of the match or -1 if not found. It first preprocesses the pattern to compute its longest proper prefix-suffix (LPS) array, which enables efficient skipping of redundant comparisons during the search phase by backtracking to the longest matching prefix when a mismatch occurs.
